name: io.github.mcpwright/census-mcp
title: Census (ACS by ZIP)
description: U.S. Census (ACS) data by ZIP: income, demographics, housing, education, from a local store.

environmentVariables.name: CENSUS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Free Census API key (get one at https://api.census.gov/data/key_signup.html). Required for the one-time bulk download of the ACS dataset.
